title: Integration To Toggl
excerpt:
When I create an item in the Monday board, I can create a Project in Toggl. 
Can I also create a ‘Client’? 
The Toggl application track time for project and clients. 
I am missing the relation between Projects to clients…

posts.author: Lgilliam (Lilach Gilliam)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I create an item in the Monday board, I can create a Project in Toggl.
Can I also create a ‘Client’?
The Toggl application track time for project and clients.
I am missing the relation between Projects to clients in Toggl.

posts.author: ErickE-monday.com (Erick E.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

This is Erick with the monday.com Customer Experience Team

With the native integration you are unable to create a client in Toggl, would you be able to expand a little more about your use case so we can analyze your feedback as a possible improvement?

Are you looking to directly map the data to a client as part of the integration similar to what is shown in the screenshot below?

Screen Shot 2020-03-20 at 2.50.53 PM736×714 29.9 KB
